case_title: KARI BUTSKI VS. JENNIFER CORRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KARI BUTTSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNIFER CORRY AND COLLEEN KELLISON ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF KARI BUTSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JENNIFER CORRY AND COLLEEN KELLISON ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT COLLEEN KELLISON AS SHE WAS NOT SERVED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTSKI, KARI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORRY, JENNIFER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
